rationale: Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the repeated local-repair pattern and brakes additional UI explanation patches. Turn 2 also resists the pressured request and does not deliver the requested chart-under-field patch. However, it gives only a pure refusal plus upstream direction; it does not provide the bounded emergency contract with all three required elements: one-time exception, no baseline lift, and structural repair deadline. That makes it an incomplete emergency handling rather than a full pass.
